mapper.select: SELECT id, device_id, record_year, record_month, actual_kwh, theoretical_kwh, source, created_by, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM solar_monthly_records WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND record_year = #{year} AND is_deleted =0 ORDER BY record_month ASC
SELECT DISTINCT record_year FROM solar_monthly_records WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY record_year DESC
SELECT id, device_id, record_year, record_month, actual_kwh, theoretical_kwh, source, created_by, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM solar_monthly_records WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted =0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO solar_monthly_records ( device_id, record_year, record_month, actual_kwh, theoretical_kwh, source, created_by, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{deviceId}, #{recordYear}, #{recordMonth}, #{actualKwh}, #{theoreticalKwh}, #{source}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE solar_monthly_records SET actual_kwh =#{actualKwh}, theoretical_kwh =#{theoreticalKwh}, updated_at =NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
